title: pleomele interrupta
intro: Pleomele interrupta, also known as the Hawaiian Ti or Ti plant, is a species of flowering plant in the asparagus family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pleomele interrupta include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to support immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, often in combination with other medicinal plants.
